\section*{YM Branch Successor Pilot}

\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{YM Branch Successor Pilot}



This generated packet is an L2 branch-pilot shell. It is not a supersession of the canonical YM Branch Book. It tests whether structured claim records and human-authored prose fragments can regenerate a governance-faithful YM packet.
